author: Fr4gm3nt3d.sh
description: Provides a /logs slash command with interactive buttons guiding users to upload their Minecraft logs to mclo.gs.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not persistently store any data or metadata about users.
install_msg: Thanks for installing LogsHelp! The /logs slash command is now available. Make sure to sync your slash commands with `[p]slash sync` if needed.
name: LogsHelp
short: Interactive /logs help command for Minecraft players
